title: reminder.delivery.result event payload
description: Payload for eventType reminder.delivery.result when tgcarebot reports per-channel delivery outcome to webapp (POST /api/integrator/events).

reminderOccurrenceId.description: Id of the reminder occurrence that was dispatched

externalId.description: Channel user id (e.g. telegramId, maxId) used for this attempt

errorCode.description: Optional error code when success is false
